creator: wahjava@gmail.com
text:
distfile named 'svn-book-html.tar.bz2' is updated at upstream. So distinfo
also needs to be updated.

How-To-Repeat: 1. Execute as root:

   # make -C /usr/ports/devel/subversion config

2. Make sure BOOK option is checked in.

3. Now, try to build the devel/subversion port. And you'll get errors about
   checksum mismatch for svn-book-html.tar.bz2.
